root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to timing-sensitive asynchronous behavior (background tasks/events not fully settled). This PR stabilizes it by: test: enlarge timeout for test.

evidence: increases time.After from 100ms to 3s to avoid CI timing flakes (ddl/util/syncer_test.go).
